metadata.description: Codebase intelligence layer for prp-core: adds Serena (LSP) + SocratiCode (semantic) search, cross-session memory keyed by Jira ticket + branch, and Jira context injection directly into the prp-plan and prp-implement workflow phases.

plugins.name: codebase-intelligence
plugins.description: Augments prp-core prp-plan and prp-implement with two-tier codebase search...
